message: Welcome to Shiver Shack! Where the food is hot and you're not!
Welcome to Siver Shack. Home of the cheese-brrrrrrrrger. What can I get you?
Would you like to add a side or a drink to go with that?
Care for a side of fries? It's fast because we don't cook them.
Would you like one of our shakes? They're a miracle of science.
OK. Can I get you anything else?
Alright, please enjoy and be careful of frost bite.
